title: remove claude-fable-5 model
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Removes the `claude-fable-5` (Anthropic Mythos-class, via Bedrock) text model from the registry, gen text config, and available models list
- Drops its effective-prices snapshot entry and the README changelog line
- Unrelated `fable` TTS voice (AUDIO_VOICES) is untouched

Tests: `aliases`, `pricing-data`, `effective-prices.snapshot` (enter) and `model-permissions` (gen) pass.

gist.headline: Farewell, Fable
gist.blurb: We've retired the claude-fable-5 text model from our registry to keep our model offerings streamlined and focused.
gist.summary: Removed the claude-fable-5 text model from the registry, gen text config, and available models list.
gist.impact: Users will no longer be able to route text generation requests to claude-fable-5, though the unrelated 'fable' TTS voice remains fully supported.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot in a cozy library or archive room, gently packing away a glowing book (representing the 'fable' model) into a wooden crate, symbolizing a respectful retirement of the model.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot gently packing a glowing book into a small wooden crate in a warm, dusty library. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.
